heady-ai.com.name: HeadyAI
heady-ai.com.description: Pioneering Continuous Semantic Logic, Vector Symbolic Architecture, and Sacred Geometry Topology. 51+ provisional patents by HeadySystems Inc.
heady-ai.com.heroSubtitle: Pioneering Continuous Semantic Logic, Vector Symbolic Architecture, and Sacred Geometry Topology — redefining the mathematics of intelligent systems.

features.title: Continuous Semantic Logic
features.desc: Multi-valued gate operations with soft thresholds enabling probabilistic semantic reasoning. ƒ(x) ∈ [0,1] with φ-weighted activation.

features.title: Vector Symbolic Architecture
features.desc: Hyperdimensional computing with d ≥ 10,000 dimensions. Binding (⊗) and bundling (⊕) preserve semantic structure.

features.title: Sacred Geometry Topology
features.desc: The golden ratio φ ≈ 1.618 and Fibonacci scaling encode natural optimization into system architecture.

features.title: 3D Spatial Memory
features.desc: Agent memory as navigable 3D vector spaces with O(log n) octree retrieval and adaptive reorganization.
